message:
fix(storage): add 50MB safety limit on message file reads and improve unwrap_or_else clarity

- read_message_file: reject files exceeding 50MB before reading to
  prevent OOM on corrupted or adversarial message files
- self_process_repo: replace unreachable!() with descriptive expect()
  message for pop_front after front() returned Some

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
